title.en: Optyx : faster culling with fancy AI?
title.no: Optyx : faster culling with fancy AI?

summary.en: I do all my culling and post-processing in Capture One Pro 21. Or, at least, I want to, but a few missing features in Capture One makes me look into other software solutions to speed up my culling process. The idea is...
